dept_kmc_borough_desc: Kolkata Municipal Corporation is divided into 16 boroughs (I through XVI), each headed by a Borough Chairperson and managing civic services locally.
dept_kmc_ward_desc: The 144 wards of KMC are the basic unit of local administration, each represented by an elected councillor.
dept_police_division_desc: Kolkata Police Commissionerate is organized into 10 territorial divisions, each headed by a Deputy Commissioner of Police.
dept_police_station_desc: Local police stations under each division handling law and order in their jurisdiction.
dept_cesc_region_desc: CESC (Calcutta Electric Supply Corporation) operates through 6 regional offices serving Kolkata and surrounding areas.
dept_election_pc_desc: Parliamentary constituencies electing Members of Parliament to the Lok Sabha.
dept_election_ac_desc: Assembly constituencies electing Members of Legislative Assembly to the West Bengal Vidhan Sabha.
dept_admin_district_desc: Kolkata District administration headed by the District Magistrate.
dept_admin_taluk_desc: Sub-divisions headed by Sub-Divisional Officers for revenue and administrative matters.
dept_pincode_desc: Postal PIN code areas served by India Post offices.
